test_name: Schedule and View Historical Test Data
description: This scenario tests the ability to schedule a test case to run at a specific time and view the historical data for trend analysis.
steps: Navigate to the primary application dashboard.
Select an existing test case from the list.
Click the 'Schedule Test' button to open the scheduling options.
Set a specific date and time for the test execution.
Save the schedule and confirm scheduling details.
Once scheduled, wait for the test to execute at the specified time.
After test execution, navigate to the 'Historical Data' section.
Filter the historical data by date range to view specific records.
Review the test results and analyze trends or anomalies.
Export the historical data to a CSV file for reporting.
expected_results: Test case is scheduled and executed at the specified time.
Historical data is accurately recorded and can be filtered.
User can analyze trends and export data for reporting.
edge_cases: Scheduling a test case with a past date/time.
Attempting to schedule a test without selecting a test case.
Filtering historical data with an invalid date range.
Exporting historical data when no records are available.
Network issues interrupting the scheduling or data retrieval.
data_requirements: Valid user account with access to test scheduling.
Existing test case available for scheduling.
Correct date and time format for scheduling.
Data range for historical data filtering.
CSV export functionality for data reporting.
dependencies: User must have permission to schedule tests.
Test cases must be pre-existing in the system.
The system must accurately track and store historical data.
api_interactions: Internal API for scheduling test executions.
API calls to retrieve historical test data.
Export functionality to generate CSV reports.
performance_metrics: Time taken to schedule a test.
Accuracy and speed of historical data retrieval.
accessibility_requirements: Scheduling form should be accessible via keyboard.
Date and time picker should be usable by screen readers.
Filter controls for historical data should be accessible.
